title: Exploited edge framework vulnerability on payment API
description: The payment API runs a vulnerable framework version with public exploit activity and internet reachability.
rationale: Act because exploited edge framework vulnerability on payment api has credible evidence, meaningful attacker utility, and a plausible path into Digital Payments.
why_it_matters: This exposure can influence a crown-jewel path for Digital Payments, so backlog age is the wrong primary metric.
next_action: Apply emergency patch or virtual patch, validate WAF coverage, and retest externally.

title: Privileged SSO group lacks phishing-resistant MFA
description: Contractor admin group can approve privileged sessions with push MFA only.
rationale: Act because privileged sso group lacks phishing-resistant mfa has credible evidence, meaningful attacker utility, and a plausible path into Workforce Identity.
why_it_matters: Identity weakness can turn a contained technical issue into cross-service access.
next_action: Move privileged group to phishing-resistant MFA, require device posture, and retest access policy.

title: Over-permissive security group bridges CI runners to customer data subnet
description: Shared CI runners can initiate traffic to the production data subnet through an inherited cloud rule.
rationale: Attend because over-permissive security group bridges ci runners to customer data subnet affects a scoped service and needs leadership-backed coordination before the exposure ages into unacceptable risk.
why_it_matters: This exposure can influence a crown-jewel path for Cloud Delivery Platform, so backlog age is the wrong primary metric.
next_action: Restrict CI runner egress, segment production data subnet, and add cloud policy-as-code checks.
